title: blechnum corbassonii
intro: Blechnum corbassonii, also known as the Corbasson's chain fern, is a species of fern in the Blechnaceae family, native to New Caledonia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Blechnum corbassonii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions and wounds. Blechnum corbassonii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
